name: Intro
_source: m;A Hint of Things to Come
s;;Successfully defeating Gunnar's gang, Krista and friends flee deeper into Oregot.|Felicity leads the party to an underground stronghold hidden from the enemy's sights.;StyleNid=overworld_narration
for;EnemyGender;[unit.nid for unit in game.get_enemy_units() if unit.generic == True and 'NoVariant' not in unit.tags]
s;Felicity;This is as far as all of us can go for now.
s;Forrest;We're in the middle of nowhere, Felicity.

s;Felicity;I know.{w}{c:e;Felicity;NormalBlink} But it's better if as few people as possible proceed further.|Your Highness, this is a lot to ask, but will you come with me?|Once the way is clear, we can take the rest of the group with us.
s;Krista;Sure thing, Felicity. Lead the way!
s;Felicity;Watch your step, Your Highness, and stay behind me.|This entryway is littered with traps.
s;Krista;Felicity, what exactly is this place?|I know bandits sometimes have underground hideouts,|but this is way more elaborate than what I'm used to.
s;Felicity;Are you alright?|{c:e;Felicity;CloseEyes}I'm sorry. I should have been more attentive.
s;Krista;I'm fine. Don't worry about it.
s;Felicity;Here, take my hand. It would be troublesome if another trap were set off.
s;Krista;Thanks, Felicity. Let's get a move on.
s;Krista;Wait, all that back there WASN'T the entrance?!|{c:e;Krista;CloseEyes}Man, no wonder you said this would be dangerous.
s;Tora;Hey! Who the hell's out there?!
s;Tora;I dunno who you think you are, but you're not allowed down here!|Get outta here before I--
s;Tora;Wait, Felicity? You're back!{br}Did ya find Lenora?|{c:e;Tora;HalfCloseEyes}And what the hell are you wearing?
s;Felicity;It's a long story, Tora.|{c:e;Felicity;HalfCloseEyes}And, no. I didn't find her yet.
s;Felicity;A friend. I'll explain later, but we can trust her.
s;Tora;I'm not liking her scent, Felicity.{br}Smells Medean t' me.
s;Felicity;Tora, please. There's something we have to do.|{c:e;Felicity;CloseEyes}We don't have any other options.
s;Tora;{tgm}...{w}{c:e;Tora;NormalBlink}{tgm}Alright, but make sure your{tgm}...{tgm} friend sticks with you.|Can't guarantee everyone will be as courteous.
s;Felicity;Of course. Come along, Your Highness.
s;???;Hey, isn't that Felicity? She's back!;bottom;fit
s;???;Wait, what's a Medean doing with her?
s;Krista;Felicity, all those people{tgm}...{tgm} Are they Shifters?|I thought they all died out after The War of Divides.|And if you lived here before, does that mean--
s;Felicity;Please pick up the pace, Your Highness. We're almost there.
s;Krista;Where is exactly are we going?
s;Felicity;You'll see, Your Highness.|What you'll learn today will be the key to our victory against Circ's Talons.
s;Felicity;This mural depicts The War of Divides.|What truly happened, that is.;bottom;fit
s;Felicity;Tell me, Your Highness, what do you know of The War?;bottom;fit
s;Krista;Let's see... Humans and Shifters fought due to rising tensions between them.|It started when the humans captured Shifters and used them as slaves.;bottom;fit
s;Krista;The Great Beasts except for Medea passed on at some point.|The rest of the timeline is pretty vague. Records from before the war were lost.;bottom;fit
s;Felicity;I see.{w} Your Highness, look up there.;bottom;fit
s;Felicity;Mercilessly slain by their little brother Medea.;bottom;fit
s;Krista;Medea had great respect for his siblings. The other Great Beasts just grew old.|At least, that's what we were taught.;bottom;fit
s;Krista;I see that now. Man, I can't believe it...|Records of the war stated Medea only took up arms because the Shifters struck first.;bottom;fit
s;Felicity;Records written by the ones who won the war.;bottom;fit
s;Felicity;It's a miracle that the book you loaned Ervan managed to stay in the Medean archives.|All records of Circ were believed to be destroyed to cover up his existence.;bottom;fit
s;Krista;... Felicity, what did happen to Circ?|Tsubaki mentioned he birthed the Great Beasts, so where is he now?;bottom;fit
s;Krista;I shouldn't be surprised considering what he did to his siblings. Still...;bottom;fit
s;Felicity;Circ was the first that Medea struck down.|After that, the other Great Beasts retaliated.|And so began The War of Divides.;bottom;fit
s;Krista;I know you wouldn't lie to me, Felicity.{br}We've known each other for years.|But how would you know all this to begin with?|The only way you could is if--;bottom;fit
s;Felicity;This should prove my credentials enough, wouldn't you say?;bottom;fit
s;Krista;Felicity, all this time, you... You were...?!;bottom;fit
s;Felicity;A Shifter, yes.{w} You understand why I had to hide this, don't you?;bottom;fit
s;Krista;Felicity, this all is{tgm}...|{c:e;Krista;CloseEyes}{tgm}Dear Medea, I don't even know where to begin.

s;FelicityNoHat;I will say I'm still loyal to you,{br}Your Highness. I always have been.|{c:e;FelicityNoHat;CloseEyes}But that's not important right now.|{c:e;FelicityNoHat;HalfCloseEyes}History has been obfuscated so much that humans only know a perversion of the truth.|{c:e;FelicityNoHat;CloseEyes}All to make Medea himself perceived as the hero of the story.

s;Krista;Medea truly made humans in his image.|{c:e;Krista;HalfCloseEyes}Cruel. Underhanded. Selfish.|{c:e;Krista;CloseEyes}All this time as a descendant of Medea's bloodline,|I was always taught to live up to his image of modesty and chivalry.|{c:e;Krista;NormalBlink}So, yeah. It is a relief to know none of that is true.|{c:e;Krista;HalfCloseEyes,Smile}He's an absolute dastard.{w} I think I can handle living up to those standards.
s;Krista;Thanks, Felicity. I needed to hear this.{w}{c:e;Krista;NormalBlink,NoSmile} But on a more serious note,|that does give us a better idea of what Circ's Talons are trying to do.
s;Krista;Yeah. They're trying to revive him, aren't they?
s;FelicityNoHat;All the signs point to that conclusion.|{c:e;FelicityNoHat;NormalBlink}I had realized it myself a long time ago,|but I'm sure you understand why I couldn't share my thoughts.
s;Krista;There definitely would've been a lot to unpack without all this context.|{c:e;Krista;HalfCloseEyes}But now{tgm}...
s;FelicityNoHat;You're questioning if our cause is a just one.

s;FelicityNoHat;That is something for you to decide,{br}Your Highness.|{c:e;FelicityNoHat;NormalBlink}Fight for your initial goals and leave the truth buried forever,|or fight for truth and upset the status quo that's been established for a millenia?|{c:e;FelicityNoHat;CloseEyes}There is no simple answer, Your Highness.{w}{c:e;FelicityNoHat;NormalBlink} No matter which path you take,|you must be prepared for the consequences that come with it.
s;Felicity;Not quite.{w}{c:e;Felicity;HalfCloseEyes} We need a place to rest for the evening.
s;Tora;Yeah, I was afraid you'd say that.|{c:e;Tora;NormalBlink}Everyone's up in arms because of Snake-Eyes over here.
s;Tora;I don't want your kind here either.|The only reason I'm not chasin' you out is because of Felicity.|So, you'd better be grateful.
s;Felicity;I thought as much.|{c:e;Felicity;NormalBlink}Come along, Your Highness. I already have a back up plan.
s;Felicity;This should be far enough from the main part of the settlement.|Very few people come here, so we should be able to rest here without causing a ruckus.

s;Felicity;You have nothing to apologize for, Your Highness.|{c:e;Felicity;NormalBlink}Now, shall we gather the others?|I know of an alternate entrance to this part of the stronghold.|Then once we're settled,|we should begin a strategy meeting to plan our next course of action.
s;CircFollower;Spawn of Medea! Time to surrender!
s;Krista;Dammit, how'd you know we were here?!
s;CircFollower;Heh, that's our little secret.|{c:e;CircFollower;NoSmile}Now, just come quietly and we don't gotta hurt you or your friends.
s;Krista;*huff huff*|{c:e;Krista;HalfCloseEyes}Dear Medea, how could this happen?|I thought we were hidden from Circ's followers here.
s;Tora;Hey, Snake-Eyes! The hell's going on?!
s;Tora;Yeah, I got that much. Who's the enemy?
s;Krista;Circ's Talons. I don't know how, but they followed us here.
s;Tora;You serious?!|{c:e;Tora;CloseEyes}Dammit, I knew letting you guys stay here was a bad idea.
s;Krista;Look, there's no time to be pointing fingers.|We gotta defend the gates and stop these guys!
s;Tora;Hey, if you guys need to stock up, we've got a couple shops.
s;Tora;And an <red>armory</> over here.|But hurry it up! We ain't got all night!
s;Felicity;One more thing, Your Highness. See those walls?|Those barriers are the stonghold's last layer of protection.
s;Felicity;While most adversaries will find it difficult to pass through,|anyone who <red>knows how to pick locks</> will have an easier time disabling them. So, be aware!
prep;true;Prepare to Charge;Guide;True;AccessLibrary;Access the guide for tips and tricks.;gba;no_chap_disp
